task_completion.description: Verify that a new item has been created with the Item Type set to 'Newspaper Article'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Item Type' field should display 'Newspaper Article'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the info pane should exactly read 'Supreme Court Ruling Makes Same-Sex Marriage a Right Nationwide'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Author field is correctly filled with Adam Liptak.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Author' field should show 'Liptak' for the last name and 'Adam' for the first name in the creator fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the Publication and Date fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publication' field should read 'The New York Times' and the 'Date' field should read 'June 26, 2015' (or '2015-06-26').

task_completion.description: Verify the Section, Pages, and Place fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Section' field should be 'A', 'Pages' should be 'A1', and 'Place' should be 'New York'.

task_completion.description: Verify the URL and Abstract fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'URL' field should contain 'https://www.nytimes.com/2015/06/27/us/supreme-court-same-sex-marriage.html', and the 'Abstract' field should contain 'The Supreme Court ruled that the Constitution guarantees a right to same-sex marriage.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Juris-M GUI application to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Juris-M application window with its standard interface (library pane, item list, info pane), not a terminal, script editor, or database viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the data into the appropriate individual fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be distributed across the correct individual metadata fields in the Juris-M info pane, not pasted as a single block of text into a note or a single field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Juris-M interface should appear native and standard without any web developer tools, DOM inspectors, or console windows open.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The item is a real newspaper article. Verified metadata: Type is 'newspaperArticle'. Title is 'Supreme Court Ruling Makes Same-Sex Marriage a Right Nationwide'. Author is Adam Liptak. Publication is 'The New York Times'. Date is '2015-06-26' (or June 26, 2015). Place is 'New York'. URL domain is 'nytimes.com'. Abstract contains 'same-sex marriage'.
